prompt: For a protein engineering research program, construct variants of JAK2 (Kinase) from Homo sapiens with altered substrate specificity or improved catalytic efficiency. detail a computational workflow covering: (1) active site scaffold selection, (2) catalytic residue placement using AlphaFold2, (3) substrate binding optimization and variant screening. Include relevant computational tools and databases to use.
